headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://unpkg.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' https://roundsapp.onrender.com; form-action 'self'; base-uri 'self'; object-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'; upgrade-insecure-requests
